prompt: Create a dreamy vertical 9:16 high-fashion fantasy portrait of an adult woman seated among pale botanical flowers, with an ethereal pastel aesthetic. The subject has very long platinum blonde hair, loose and flowing over her shoulders and lap, and wears a delicate sheer ivory lace robe-dress with embroidered floral appliqué, a deep V neckline, long translucent sleeves, and soft layered fabric draped around her seated legs. Place a large opaque beige square directly over the center of her face, hiding all facial features. Add a lush floral headpiece with exactly 5 prominent flowers: 2 large blush-pink peonies near the temples, 1 smaller dusty-rose flower near the crown, and 2 pale cream blossoms tucked into the hair, plus golden autumn leaves. Surround her with exactly 14 prominent visible blossoms in the scene: 5 coral-pink daisy-like flowers, 4 pale blush outlined poppies, 3 cream sketch-style flowers, and 2 soft foreground flowers blurred by depth of field. The background should feel like delicate hand-drawn botanical wallpaper mixed with real flowers, using peach, blush, cream, ivory, and muted gold tones. Pose her with one hand raised near the cheek and the other resting on her lap, elegant fingers visible, soft backlighting glowing through the hair, shallow depth of field, romantic haze, high detail lace texture, luminous skin, and a refined editorial photography look. Use soft ivory, blush pink, coral peach, muted gold, and warm beige; keep the mood romantic, airy, and ethereal. No text, no watermark, no harsh shadows, no dark colors.
